title: alternanthera triandra var. nodiflora
intro: Alternanthera triandra var. nodiflora, also known as 'African joyweed', is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Alternanthera triandra var. nodiflora include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation and fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in teas or tinctures.
